qa_pairs.question: Where should a User-Defined Function (UDF) file be placed on the cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: The UDF should be placed in the directory where your journal, cas, and dat files reside.

qa_pairs.question: When should commands for a User-Defined Function (UDF) be added to the journal file?
qa_pairs.answer: Commands for a UDF should be added into your journal file before the commands that read in your simulation cas/dat files.

qa_pairs.question: What configuration check should be performed on the cas file before uploading it to the Alliance, regarding User-Defined Functions (UDFs)?
qa_pairs.answer: Before uploading your cas file onto the Alliance, you should ensure that neither the Interpreted UDFs Dialog Box nor the UDF Library Manager Dialog Box are configured to use any UDF.

qa_pairs.question: Why is it important that no User-Defined Functions (UDFs) are configured in the dialog boxes before uploading a cas file?
qa_pairs.answer: This ensures that only the journal file commands are in control when jobs are submitted, regardless of whether you use the Interpreted or Compiled UDF approach.
